summary: Retro-seeded post-PR regression baseline for PR #3. Fixed five concrete regressions across tick orchestration, decision payload integrity, FFI keyword parity, damped contagion cooling, and criticality decay-control; reviewed five STRIX SPOFs (SPOF-01, SPOF-02, SPOF-03, SPOF-04, SPOF-08); final CI green.
next_actions: Use this run as the baseline for future POST_PR_REGRESSION reviews touching tick, brain or mesh coordination boundaries.
Repeat DOC-005 on any PR that simultaneously edits tick.rs, brain.py and contagion or gossip paths before merge or release hardening.
